titleStmt.title: SII 35.84: original edition by D. M. Nagaraju
No. 84. (A.R. No. 216 of 1952-53.) KURUVATTI, HARAPANAHALLI TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the capital of a pillar to the right in the Mallikārjuna temple.
This inscription is dated in the 15th year of the reign of Vīraballāḷa, Raktākshi, Vaiśākha Puṇṇame, Monday, solar eclipse, corresponding to A.D. 1204, April 15, Thursday (not Monday).

It registers a gift of 2 guṇigana-mattar of land to god Āhumallēśvara by the Mahājanas headed by the Ūroḍeyas, etc of the village Kureti. The gift was entrusted into the hands of rājaguru Lōkābharaṇadēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti hoysaṇa vīraballāḷa varṣada 15 neya raktaṁ
kṣisaṁvatsarada vaiśākhada puṇname sōmavāra sūryagrahaṇadaṁ
du śrīmadanādi Agrahāraṁ kuruttiya Uroḍeya pramukha Aśē
samahājanaṁgaḷ śrī Āhumallēśvaradēvargge taṁma hiriyakeṟeya ba
ḍagaṇa tuṁgake paḍuva hola sasadēvara yiṁ teṁka śrīmadrājaguru lōkā
bharaṇadēvara kālaṁkarcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍikoṭṭa gadde guṇigana mattaru 2
Digital edition of SII 35.84 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
